violations.text: The screen door to the outside, located in the (kitchen and front dining ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025
(1 Dr Reach in ) located in the (kitchen) area was not in good repair.Observed damaged door handles and tape surrounding side of door frame. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep table shelves and wok area ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025
Box of dry foods were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

(Cooked pork ) was observed held at (46 ) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

(Various foods) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

Working containers of (spices and dry food ) are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

The screen door to the outside, located in the (kitchen and front dining area ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025
Inspector observed a frozen shrimp being stored on a used cardboard chicken box.PIc removed to food grade container Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025
Knives were observed being stored between prep units. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025
(1 Dr Reach in ) located in the (kitchen ) area was not in good repair.Observed damaged door handles and tape surround side of door frame. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025
The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation debris: 1.prep table shelves 2.all refrigeration units interior and exterior 3.wok area 4.handsink New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

Working containers of food product are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of debris: 1.food storage bins observed with food debris 2.food storage shelves in the walk in cooler and throughout kitchen area have soil and food residue. 3.One door refrigerators and freezers have an accumulation of food debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or grease. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

The door frame in the back kitchen area is in poor repair(broken frame being held together with wood blocks). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024
